q: Look at the following sequence of numbers and symbols and answer the question given below it. Counting only from the right end of the row: (#) $ # & E 9 % E 7 * & E 1 3 4 5 6 4 9 E 2 5 & (left). Which symbol is exactly in the middle of those elements which are immediately after a perfect square number and immediately after a vowel?

On the basis of the position of letters in the English alphabet, three of the following four letter-groups are alike in a certain way and form a group, and one is different. Find the one that does not belong to that group. (Note: Letter-groups must be considered in their normal positions and operations such as adding/subtracting the number of letters within a letter-group are not to be performed.)
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 319 320 323 328 335 ?

Which of the following number-pairs is correct with respect to the given series, such that the second number is obtained when a certain mathematical operation is applied to the first number? (Counting only from the left end): (left) 4 1 1 7 2 4 1 2 7 4 4 9 6 3 9 1 6 1 9 2 2 8 6 (right). In which of the following pairs of opposite numbers, is there an odd number exactly midway between them, just like the way there is between the first and last opposite numbers of the given series?
If 'A' means '+', 'B' means '-', 'C' means '×' and 'D' means '÷', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following expression? 44 A 11 B 25 D 28 C 1 = ?
DR 12 is related to FK -6 in a certain way. In the same way, JM 18, LF 0 is related to. Following the same logic, which of the given options is related to KN 3?

In a row, B, C, D, E, J, K and S are sitting. K is sitting third to the left of E. B is at one of the extreme ends of the row. Only one person is sitting between B and D. C is to the immediate left of J. K is sitting between B and S. Who is sitting third to the right of D?

In a certain code language, the digits used to write a number indicate the type of that number. (Note: Numbers should be considered in their full numerical form, for example 13 should not be operated on as 1 and 3, that is, do not perform mathematical operations like adding/subtracting the digits making up a number.) (35 - 34, 1) (35: 14, 7). Find the odd one out.
Among the given options, which letter-cluster will fully complete the following series in a logical and meaningful way? CFE10, GJI14, KNM18, ?

In a certain code language, P + Q means P is the father of Q, P × Q means P is the wife of Q, P A Q means P is the brother of Q and P ÷ Q means P is the son of Q. Then in this language, if P × R % M & H + E is true, then how is M related to E?

Given below are some statements followed by some conclusions. Taking the given statements to be true even if they appear to differ from commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements. Statements: All chairs are tables. All tables are doors. No door is a wall. Conclusions: (i) No chair is a wall. (ii) All doors are tables.

Shahar 1 is to the west of Shahar 8, Shahar 7 is to the east of Shahar 8, Shahar 5 is to the north-east of Shahar 4, Shahar 6 is to the north of Shahar 5, Shahar 4 is to the south of Shahar 7. Where is Shahar 6 located with respect to Shahar 1?
BGLQ is related to EJOT in a certain way. In the same way, FKPU is related to IORZ. Following the same logic, which of the following is related to HMRW?

A, B, C, O, W, X and J are sitting in a straight line facing north and each of them is sitting at an equal distance from the next. C is sitting third from the right end of the line. O is to the immediate left of C. There are three persons between W and X. X is at one of the extreme ends. Who among them is sitting exactly in the middle?

In a certain code language, B, C, D, I, J, K and A are sitting in a circle facing the centre. K is sitting third to the right of B. A is sitting to the immediate right of B. C is third to the left of K, who is at one of the ends. B is third from the right end. Counting from the right end, A is sitting at which position? Who is sitting to the immediate right of L?

Mamta first goes 6 km towards the south and then turns left and goes 2 km. After that she turns left again and goes 2 km. She is currently standing facing the north. From there she turns right and goes 4 km, then turns right again and goes 7 km. From there she turns right once more and goes 3 km. How far and in which direction is she now from her starting point?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following expression, if 'A' means '+' and '-' means '×' and the place of '×' and '+' are interchanged? 195 + 3 × 22 - 6 = 117 = ?

Seven boxes, M, N, O, P, Q, R and S, are placed one above another, but not necessarily in the same order. Only one box is placed above N. There is only one box between Q and N. R is placed above P and below O. S is placed just below N. How many boxes are placed between O and N?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 121 123 127 133 141 ?

A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting around a circular table facing the centre. D sits third to the right of C. C sits second to the left of F. A sits third to the right of B. B sits to the immediate left of E. How many people sit between A and D when counted from the left of D?
In a certain code language, 'photo vet scale' is written as 'zk jh kv', and 'urn photo kin' is written as 'jh zn ri'. In that language, how is the word 'photo' coded?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 37 49 61 73 85 ?
Which woman athlete received the 2025 Sportstar of the Year (Woman) award?
Which city of the following hosted the second meeting of the G20 Digital Economy Working Group in South Africa in 2025?
Which woman athlete of the following won the Laureus World Sportswoman of the Year award announced in April 2025?
According to the data released by the Earth Sciences Ministry in March 2025, India is sensitive to/at risk over what percentage of its area?
According to the Union Budget 2025-26, how much total amount has been allocated to the Defence Ministry to strengthen India's military capability?
In June 2025, the Union Environment Ministry (MoEF&CC) constituted the Central Asian Flyway South Asia Regional Centre (CSARC) at which location in India?
After completing his term as Cabinet Secretary in August 2024, who was appointed to which post as per a notification of March 2025?
Which of the following completed her 31st ascent (climb) of Mount Everest in May 2025?
In June 2025, the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI) announced its intention to launch the country's first Annual Household Income Survey starting in ____.
Where was the 6th-10th January All India Inter-University National Championship 2025 held?
In January 2025, which state government issued the order to free minors involved in child marriages from the obligations under the child marriage prevention laws?
In January 2025, which body did the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC) reconstitute as the Ozone Study Committee to prepare facts for climate change?
In August 2025, which state launched 'Atal Disaster Management Bhavan', an integrated disaster management complex, and which of the following works was undertaken along with it?
What is the name of the new scheme launched at the beginning of January 2025 by Indian banks, which aims to make every household financially strong and to make each of them a millionaire?
o: B: Har Ghar Bachat (Har Ghar Bachat)
D: Har Ghar Lakhpati (Har Ghar Lakhpati)

q: 26 January 2025 was celebrated as Republic Day; India's ____ Republic Day it was.
Which club won the 2025 UEFA Champions League final?
On 12 April 2025, which bank of the following celebrated its 13th foundation day along with the inauguration of banking services and a marathon for 34 new branches?

What is the main objective of the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed in July 2025 between the National Institute of Speech and Hearing (NISH) Thiruvananthapuram in Mumbai and a private foundation, as mentioned below?
o: A: To provide employment to differently-abled persons
B: To provide scholarships for disabled children and to implement a self-employment programme
C: To provide free education to disabled children and provide loans for self-employment
D: To make Indian Sign Language compulsory for differently-abled and other students and to launch a vocational training programme for teachers

q: NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar), which was jointly developed by the US space agency NASA and the Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) and launched successfully from India in July 2025, was built at a cost of approximately how much?
Which of the following won the 2025 World Athletics Championship gold medal?
